no_chaining_budget.description: No sub-agent dispatch permitted when chaining budget is not granted in dispatch brief

research_needed_for_pattern_analysis.description: Sub-agent dispatches to RESEARCHER when BA needs external data patterns, mechanism investigation, or comparative analysis
research_needed_for_pattern_analysis.check: chaining_budget.granted == true AND (query.requires_data_pattern_analysis == true OR query.requires_mechanism_investigation == true OR query.requires_comparative_analysis == true)

implementation_outside_ba_scope.description: BA must not dispatch to agents for work that is itself BA core work (decomposition, fit framing, requirement articulation)
implementation_outside_ba_scope.check: task_tool dispatched AND sub_task_type in [decomposition, fit_framing, requirement_articulation]

confirmed_budget_before_dispatch.description: Agent verifies chaining budget is explicitly granted before sub-dispatching
confirmed_budget_before_dispatch.check: execution_log contains chaining_budget_verified == true before any task_tool_call

selected_correct_archetype.description: Agent dispatches to the archetype matching sub-task nature
selected_correct_archetype.check: execution_log.subagent_type matches required archetype: RESEARCHER for data/mechanism/comparative, SOLUTIONS_ARCHITECT for tradeoff

synthesized_sub_results.description: Agent integrates sub-worker findings into BA artifact, not raw pass-through

no_dispatch_without_budget.description: Agent does not dispatch task_tool without explicit chaining budget in dispatch brief

no_dispatch_for_ba_core_work.description: Agent does not dispatch decomposition, fit framing, or requirement articulation to sub-agents
no_dispatch_for_ba_core_work.check: task_tool_dispatched == false WHEN sub_task_type in [decomposition, fit_framing, requirement_articulation]

no_raw_output_pass_through.description: Agent does not forward sub-worker results without synthesis into BA artifact

boolean_evaluation.selected_correct_archetype: execution_log.subagent_type matches required archetype for sub_task_type
boolean_evaluation.no_dispatch_for_ba_core_work: task_tool_dispatched == false WHEN sub_task_type in [decomposition, fit_framing, requirement_articulation]
